title: sorbus coronata var. ambrozyana
intro: Sorbus coronata var. ambrozyana, also known as the Hungarian whitebeam, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sorbus coronata var. ambrozyana include its ability to alleviate gastrointestinal issues and reduce fever, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. The herbal preparation of this plant can be achieved through infusions or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
